name: MR BEARDMORES
subtitle: Barbershop · Gentlemen’s Grooming
tagline: Classic men’s barbering in Manchester’s Northern Quarter — sharp cuts, hot-towel shaves, and beards shaped by hand.

services.name: Skin Fade
services.desc: Precision fade with clippers and scissors, finished sharp.

services.name: Classic Cut
services.desc: Scissor cut with wash, hot towel and a straight-razor neckline.

services.name: Hot-Towel Shave
services.desc: Full traditional wet shave — lather, steam, and a clean finish.

services.name: Beard Sculpt
services.desc: Shape, line-up and conditioning oil to keep it tidy.

services.name: Kids' Cut
services.desc: Patient cuts for the smaller gentlemen. Under 12s.

services.name: Head Shave
services.desc: Bowl-free, smooth, with hot towel and aftercare.

about.title: A proper barbershop, since 2016.
paragraphs: Mr Beardmores is a Northern Quarter barbershop built for the kind of haircut you can’t get at a high-street chain.
Every cut is done by a barber who’s been with us for years — no rotating chairs, no upsell, just a good cut and a proper shave.
Walk in or book, sit down, leave looking right.

whyChoose.text: Barbers who've been with us for years — your cut stays consistent
Book ahead or walk in — we run on time
Clean blades, sanitised kit, every single client

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Best fade in the Northern Quarter, and they remember your name.

reviews.name: Rishi K.
reviews.text: The hot-towel shave is genuinely the best half hour in Manchester.

reviews.name: Marcus L.
reviews.text: Took my son for his first proper cut — patient and brilliant.
